title: Better Playtime
description: Makes Minecraft Better And More Fun
body:
## **Better Playtime**

A Whole New World to Explore

Get ready to experience Minecraft like never before! Better Playtime is a modpack that overhauls the entire game, adding new features, new biomes, and new challenges.

Features:

New biomes: Explore new and exciting biomes, each with its own unique flora and fauna.
New mobs: Encounter new creatures, some friendly and some not so friendly.
New blocks and items: Build and craft with a variety of new blocks and items.
New dimensions: Travel to new dimensions, each with its own unique challenges.
New game mechanics: Experience new game mechanics that will change the way you play Minecraft.

Installation:

Donwload the Modrinth App : [MODRINTH!](https://modrinth.com/app)

Go in the Search bar and Search "Better Playtime".

When you Find it, install it and click on play to enjoy a new adventure!

Additional Notes:

This modpack is still in development, so there may be some bugs.
We appreciate your feedback! Please let us know if you have any suggestions or bug reports.
We hope you have a blast playing Better Playtime!
